---
title: "Home"
image: img/Ricky_Macharm.png
toc: false
listing:
  - id: latest-posts
    contents: blog
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
---

::: {.hero-section}

# Ricky Macharm, MScFE

<p class="hero-tagline">AI Researcher &amp; Consultant | Data Science Instructor</p>

<p class="hero-subtitle">
Exploring machine learning, financial engineering, and NLP.
Sharing knowledge through teaching, writing, and open-source.
</p>

<div class="hero-links">
  <a href="/blog/" class="btn btn-primary">Read the Blog</a>
  <a href="/projects/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">View My Work</a>
  <a href="mailto:Ricky.Macharm@SisengAI.com" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Get in Touch</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.stats-bar}
<div class="stat-item">
  <div class="stat-number">9+</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Blog Posts</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-item">
  <div class="stat-number">8+</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Years in Data</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-item">
  <div class="stat-number">6</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Projects</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-item">
  <div class="stat-number">2</div>
  <div class="stat-label">Publications</div>
</div>
:::

---

::: {.content-section}

<span class="section-label">About</span>

### About Me

<div class="about-card">
Hey there! I'm Ricky, the brain behind SisengAI. It's more than just a project — it's my playground in the ever-exciting world of Data Science, Machine Learning, Financial Engineering, and NLP. My adventure in this realm kicked off in 2017, when I was 43 and stumbled upon the wonders of Python & pandas. It was a game-changer for me, shifting gears from my days as a maintenance engineer in Nigeria and dabbling in renewable energy consultancy across Nigeria and Ethiopia.

When the world paused during the pandemic, I turned to YouTube, sharing Python tricks and tips on my channel (check it out [here](https://www.youtube.com/@theafricanquant501/featured)). These days, you'll find me at WorldQuant University in New Orleans, LA, where I teach data science. It's a cool place, and you can learn more about it [here](https://www.wqu.edu/programs/applied-ds-lab/).

Not just a man behind the screen, I've also been out and about, consulting for companies and people, spreading the data science cheer through seminars, and teaching both online and in-person. On this very website, you'll discover a treasure trove of my published works, thought-provoking blog posts, and the latest buzz on my research projects.

Got questions? Ideas bubbling up? Or maybe a project you think we can collaborate on? Don't hesitate to [contact me](mailto:Ricky.Macharm@SisengAI.com). I'm all ears and ready to chat!
</div>

:::

---

::: {.content-section-alt}

<span class="section-label">Journey</span>

### Education & Experience

<p class="section-subtitle">A path from electrical engineering to financial engineering, with data science at the centre.</p>

<div class="exp-grid">

::: {.exp-card}
<p class="exp-title">MSc in Financial Engineering</p>
<p class="exp-institution">WorldQuant University</p>
<p class="exp-description">New Orleans, LA, USA</p>
<span class="exp-badge">2021</span>
:::

::: {.exp-card}
<p class="exp-title">B. Eng in Electrical & Electronics Engineering</p>
<p class="exp-institution">Abubakar Tafawa Balewa University</p>
<p class="exp-description">Bauchi, Nigeria</p>
<span class="exp-badge">2000</span>
:::

::: {.exp-card}
<p class="exp-title">Data Science Instructor</p>
<p class="exp-institution">WorldQuant University</p>
<p class="exp-description">Teaching data science in the Applied Data Science Lab.</p>
<span class="exp-badge">2022–Present</span>
:::

::: {.exp-card}
<p class="exp-title">Co-Author & Researcher</p>
<p class="exp-institution">Masakhane</p>
<p class="exp-description">Participatory research for low-resourced machine translation in African languages.</p>
<span class="exp-badge">2020–Present</span>
:::

</div>

:::

---

::: {.content-section}

<span class="section-label">Writing</span>

### Latest Posts

<p class="section-subtitle">Thoughts on Python, data science, machine learning, and the craft of building things with code.</p>

::: {#latest-posts}

:::

<p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="/blog/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">View All Posts</a>
</p>

:::
